details.test: Task 1: Highest-paying yard for Aluminum Cans and contact about weekend hours
Task 2: Schedule earliest available morning residential pickup for refrigerator in 30309
Task 3: Request quote for 500 lbs copper wire using higher-paying service type
Task 4: Book cheapest available 20-yard dumpster (or fallback two 10-yard) for 10 days in 85004
Task 5: Create drop-off plan with three high-value copper items
Task 6: Sign up manufacturing business for recycling plan under $200/month with monthly pickups
Task 7: Ask about hazardous metal item using hazardous blog article
Task 8: Estimate payout for mixed steel beams and aluminum siding and choose payment method
Task 9: Book drop-off appointment for next Saturday with first-time customer promo code
